query_normalized: the impact of simulated social validation on self-perception in adolescents psychology
rationale: The paper focuses on using machine learning (multitask learning with BERT) to detect stress and depression from social media text, which is a methodological application for classification rather than an empirical study on the psychological mechanism of "simulated social validation" affecting "self-perception" in adolescents. It fails to meet criteria (a) or (b) as it does not measure the causal impact of validation on self-perception, nor does it study the specific population or construct in the
